Hi Carolina! I finished the novel you recommended last week. I really enjoyed it!
I am happy you liked it! I borrowed it from the library too. The author is amazing.
Yes! The main character travelled across the country. It was a real adventure.
Exactly. I started it on Monday and I finished it on Friday. I could not stop reading.
Did you write a review? I want to recommend this book to my brother.
Yes, I added a short review on the library website. Tell him to borrow it soon!
Last week I finished a great novel.
I borrowed the book from the library.
The author wrote a real adventure.
I really enjoyed the story.
I recommend this novel to you.

Good morning, students, and welcome to the Saint Louis school library. Last month we started a reading challenge, and it was a big success. More than fifty students joined the challenge. Together you borrowed over two hundred books from the library. Many of you finished three or four novels, and you added wonderful reviews on our website. The most popular book was an adventure story about a young explorer. Last Friday we recommended ten new novels for the holidays. Remember, you can borrow up to three books at a time, and you return them after two weeks. The library opens at eight in the morning and closes at five in the afternoon. So come in, pick a good novel, and start your next reading adventure. Happy reading, everyone.

Hi, this is Carolina. You asked me about the book I read, so here is my short review. Last weekend I borrowed a novel from the school library. The author is a famous writer from Brazil, and the story is a real adventure. On Saturday I started the first chapter, and I loved it. I finished the whole book in only two days because I really enjoyed it. The main character travelled to many countries and discovered an old secret. After I closed the book, I recommended it to my best friend. I also added a short review on the library website. If you like adventure stories, I recommend this novel to you. It is one of the best books I read this year. Talk to you soon.

Last week Carolina borrowed a novel from the library. On Saturday she started the first chapter. She read every day and enjoyed the adventure. On Friday she finished the whole book. Finally she recommended it to her best friend.
